name: Greek Salad with Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 large Pepper, thinly sliced (Red, Yellow or Orange)
1 cup Greek olives, or black olives
3/4 cup Vegetable oil or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomatoes, cucumber, onion, peppers, olives and feta cheese in a salad bowl.
2. Mix dressing ingredients and add to the salad.
3. Toss gently until everything is well combined.
4. Serve and enjoy. Makes 5-6 servings.
